attacks.name: Flower Trick
attacks.term_text: Choose a spot from among your opponent’s Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent’s next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.term_text: During your opponent’s next turn, the Defending Pokémon can’t retreat.

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.term_text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.term_text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability Extra Heal
ability.description: Once during your turn, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon ex that has any Energy attached. If you do, discard a random Energy from that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Red-Hot Headbutt
attacks.term_text: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is a [Grass] or [Metal] Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Ball Roll
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Binding Greed
attacks.term_text: During your opponent’s next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 2 [Colorless] more.

attacks.name: Cheerful Singing
attacks.term_text: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

ability.name: Ability Passionate Voice
ability.description: Once during your turn, you may discard 1 [Fire] Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. During this turn, attacks used by your [Fire] Pokémon do +50 damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Armor Cannon
attacks.term_text: Discard a [Fire] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability Armor
ability.description: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Megafire of Envy
attacks.term_text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent’s last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Splashing Dodge
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent’s next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Splashing Turn
attacks.term_text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability Torrent
ability.description: If this Pokémon’s remaining HP is 50 or less, attacks used by this Pokémon do +60 damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triple Whip
attacks.term_text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.term_text: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ice Punch
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Shedding Spiral
attacks.term_text: If you have no cards in your deck, this attack can be used for 1 [Water] Energy.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.term_text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can’t attack.

attacks.name: Rally Back
attacks.term_text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent’s last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability Ice Maker
ability.description: Once during your turn, you may take a [Water] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the [Water] Pokémon in the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Diving Icicles
attacks.term_text: Discard all [Water] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.term_text: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.term_text: Discard a [Lightning] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Cannon
attacks.term_text: If you have 4 or more [Lightning] Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Lightning Laser
attacks.term_text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Fighting Sword
attacks.term_text: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.term_text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.term_text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.term_text: Discard a card from your hand. If you can’t, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Last Respects
attacks.term_text: This attack does 20 more damage for each [Psychic] Pokémon in your discard pile.

attacks.name: Continuous Coin Toss
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.term_text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.term_text: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

attacks.name: Dynamite Punch
attacks.term_text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Adrenaline Hammer
attacks.term_text: This Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Arrogant Impact
attacks.term_text: If this Pokémon’s remaining HP is 60 or less, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Rampaging Fang
attacks.term_text: Discard 2 [Fighting] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Muddy Hammer
attacks.term_text: Discard the top card of your opponent’s deck.

attacks.name: Rocket Jump
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.term_text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Colorful Attack
attacks.term_text: If your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent’s next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gigaton Hammer
attacks.term_text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can’t use Gigaton Hammer.

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.term_text: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Iron Supply
attacks.term_text: Take a [Metal] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spending Rush
attacks.term_text: 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon is chosen at random for each [Metal] Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

attacks.name: Leg Stomp
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can’t attack.

attacks.name: Double Hit
attacks.term_text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Triple Gnawing
attacks.term_text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.term_text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Driving Buddy
attacks.term_text: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

trainer_text: Flip a coin. If heads, take a [Lightning] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [Lightning] Pokémon.
The Stage 2 Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost.
Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your opponent’s Pokémon that have an Ability.
Each player shuffles the cards in their hand into their deck, then draws that many cards.

Look at a random Supporter card that’s not Penny from your opponent’s deck and shuffle it back into their deck. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this card.
